title: Armor Trim Compat
description: Adds compatibility between many modded armor trims and trim materials!
body:
**Description:**

This resourcepack adds compatbility between multiple modded armor trims and modded armor trim materials, this pack works on Forge, Fabric, and Neforge and on all versions of the game 1.21.2 and below!


**Curseforge:**
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/armor-trim-compats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/armor-trim-compats)



**Supported Mods:**

- Biomes O' Plenty
  
- Frostiful
  
- L_Ender's_Cataclysm
  
- Undergarden
  
- Twilight Forest
  
- Illager Invasion
  
- Geode Plus
  
- Galosphere Trims
  
- Deep Aether
  
- Aether Redux
  
- Upgrade Aquatic
  
- Neapolitan
  
- Atmospheric
  
- Alex's Caves
  
- Blue Skies
  
- Wilderness
  
- Jaden's Nether Expansion
